channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-17
item.description:
The open-source research community has been buzzing with activity lately, with notable progress being made in the quest-bih/oddpub project. The ontogenerator, a key component of this project, has seen significant refinements, including a new release (version 7.3.0) and updates to its documentation and README file. These changes aim to make the ontogenerator more user-friendly and informative, with a focus on keyword cleanup and clarity. The addition of a Zenodo badge is also a noteworthy development, allowing users to easily access the project's DOI and citation information. Overall, these updates demonstrate the community's commitment to improving and sharing knowledge, and we celebrate the progress being made across these interconnected projects. As the quest-bih/oddpub project continues to evolve, we look forward to seeing how these advancements will impact the broader research landscape.

33 commits across 3 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

regcheck22 commits
oddpub8 commits
metacheck3 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the repository, as indicated by the commit message "Merge branch 'feature-non-apa-newer' of https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into feature-non-apa-newer". The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch also received "admin updates", according to the commit message. No other branches were mentioned in the provided commit messages. The changes were limited to the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, with no other branches or modules mentioned. The specific nature of the "admin updates" was not detailed in the commit message.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: oddpub: 5 commits today
item.description:
quest-bih/oddpub

The `main` branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits aimed at refining the ontogenerator. The ontogenerator's README file was touched up, as indicated by the commit message "ontogenerator: README touchup", to presumably make it more informative or user-friendly. The version number of the ontogenerator was incremented to 7.3.0, as stated in the commit "ontogenerator: Increment version number to 7.3.0", marking a new release. A Zenodo badge was added, according to the commit "ontogenerator: zenodo badge", likely to display the project's DOI or citation information. Additionally, the documentation was updated, with a focus on keyword cleanup, as described in the commit "ontogenerator: Documentation update, keyword cleanup", and a previous commit also updated the documentation, stating "ontogenerator: documentation update".

5 commit(s) today:

  • 441d354 [main] README touchup — ontogenerator
  • 998a877 [main] Increment version number to 7.3.0 — ontogenerator
  • 95643d5 [main] zenodo badge — ontogenerator
  • 7c98de1 [main] Documentation update, keyword cleanup — ontogenerator

New release: v7.3.0 — Toba

View all commits →
